title: Telemetry Event Envelope
description: Standard envelope for all telemetry events. Defines required fields that wrap every event.

id.description: Unique event ID for deduplication during sync

name.description: Event name (lowercase_snake_case). Must exist in taxonomy.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when event occurred

session_id.description: Session UUID for grouping user events

properties.description: Event-specific properties (optional). Must be in allowlist for this event.
